basic_details.job_title: ICAR NIPB Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (ICAR NIPB)
basic_details.short_information: ICAR National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (ICAR NIPB) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nipb.icar.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR NIPB Research Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: Female: 45 years; Relaxation for OBC Non-Creamy Layer/SC/ST/PH candidates as per GoI rules

qualification.education_qualification: PhD or Master’s in Molecular Biology/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Bioinformatics with specialization in Plant Science and required research experience
qualification.details: Research Associate: For Ph.D degree holders: PhD degree in Molecular Biology/ Biotechnology/ Molecular Biology and Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Bioinformatics with specialization in Plant Science. OR For Master’s degree holders: Master’s degree in Molecular Biology/ Biotechnology/ Molecular Biology and Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Bioinformatics with relevant specialization with 4 years/5 years of Bachelor’s degree having 1st division or 60% marks or equivalent overall GPA, with at-least 3 years’ of research experience as evidenced from fellowship/associateship/training/other engagement and one research paper in SCI/NAAS rated (≥4) Journal.

salary_details.details: Rs. 61000/- + 30% HRA (Master’s degree holders) Rs. 67000/- + 30% HRA (PhD degree holders)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR NIPB Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date for online application, if opting for a virtual mode, is 10th June 2026. For the walk-in interview, candidates should report on 12th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a PhD degree or a Master’s degree in Molecular Biology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Bioinformatics with a specialization in Plant Science and relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate post is 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for female candidates and reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 61,000/- + 30% HRA for Master's degree holders and Rs. 67,000/- + 30% HRA for PhD degree holders per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Research Associate position at ICAR NIPB?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report at the specified venue with all required documents on the interview date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the walk-in interview date and time?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held on 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to report by 09:30 am.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ICAR NIPB located?
faq.answer: ICAR National Institute for Plant Biotechnology is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.
